sprite File List

Here is a list of all documented files with brief descriptions:
sprite/builtins.cpp [code]Implementation of built-in types
sprite/builtins.hpp [code]Interface to built-in types
sprite/common.hpp [code]Common includes and definitions
sprite/create.hpp [code]Defines the Node::create function
sprite/exec.cpp [code]Implements functions related to execution
sprite/exec.hpp [code]Interface to the execution components
sprite/fingerprint.hpp [code]Defines the Fingerprint type
sprite/node.hpp [code]Defines the Node type
sprite/operators.hpp [code]Implements built-in operators used by the implementation
sprite/payloads.hpp [code]Defines the payload types. See documentation of Node
sprite/pointer.hpp [code]Defines NodePtr, the smart pointer that manages nodes
sprite/program.cpp [code]
sprite/program.hpp [code]Implements the Program structure
sprite/rewrite.hpp [code]Defines the rewrite operation
sprite/system.hpp [code]Defines the system interface
sprite/user_module.hpp [code]Defines a basic implementation of the Module interface
sprite/visit.hpp [code]Implements visitation for nodes
sprite/detail/create.hpp [code]Implements Node::create through preprocessor magic
sprite/detail/node_impl.hpp [code]Implements Node members
sprite/tests/concat.cpp [code]Temporary code to implement lists directly
sprite/tests/int.cpp [code]Tests for the built-in int module (incomplete)
sprite/tests/io.cpp [code]Tests for built-in I/O operations
sprite/tests/test_common.hpp [code]Common statements for test files
